RULING:

Off Calendar Nov-03-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John J. Pugh, Esq. 916/830-0556 for Petitioner
Mr. Pugh appeared for a clarification of the Court's tentative ruling. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative as follows -- PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award -- granted as to confirmation of award, no opposition filed. The request for attorneys was argued and taken under submission by the Court. Proposed order submitted. (301/JLW/ju) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
